name: @bb/cms-runtime
description: Shared CMS save chain + media upload chain for BB Media's Next.js 16 + Vercel Blob client websites. Makes the Full-Route-Cache stale bug and the Blob egress blowout structurally impossible.

publishConfig.//: Published to GitHub Packages. The CONSUMING repo must add an .npmrc mapping the @bb scope to this registry (see .npmrc.example) and authenticate with a PAT that has write:packages (publish) / read:packages (install). Publishing is intentionally NOT wired here — it needs the org PAT supplied later.
